prompt: A refined anime-style close-up portrait of a stylish Japanese office lady in an elegant jewelry store, framed from the chest up. She has soft chestnut brown medium-length layered hair with a smooth side part, glossy highlights, and slightly tousled ends brushing her shoulders. Her face is mostly turned and partially obscured by her hair and hand, creating a coy, sophisticated composition that emphasizes her ear and accessories rather than direct eye contact. She gently touches 1 dangling earring with two fingers, as if trying it on or admiring it; the earring has 3 visible parts: a small round gemstone stud, a tiny connecting ornament, and a large transparent teardrop crystal pendant. She wears 1 delicate gold necklace with a small spherical pendant, 1 light beige blazer, and 1 soft white scoop-neck inner top. Her hand is slender with neatly manicured natural pink nails. The background is an upscale boutique jewelry display with warm golden bokeh lighting, softly blurred glass cases, and 2 visible necklace bust stands in the background. Use a polished modern anime illustration style with clean linework, subtle realism in the hair and hands, luminous skin, luxurious reflections on the jewelry, and a calm mature atmosphere. Vertical composition, intimate crop, premium fashion editorial feel, warm indoor lighting, soft depth of field, high detail.
